title: Rubenin Jaanu
description: Rubenin Jaanu (2024) is a drama film directed by Tinesh Sarathi Krishnan and starring Ravin Rao Santheran, Shweta Sekhon, Komala Naaidu in lead roles. The film's music is composed by M Jagathees while cinematography is done by Senthil Kumaran Muniandy and edited by Tinesh Sarathi Krishnan.
